recommendations.title: Urban Justice
recommendations.overview: Seagal plays a man with a dark and violent past, who seeks revenge for the murder of his son.

recommendations.title: Today You Die
recommendations.overview: A former thief who is trying to go straight seeks vengeance on those who framed him.

recommendations.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
recommendations.overview: A mercenary-for-hire accepts a mission from a billionaire to capture a dangerous snake that could possibly help cure a terminal illness.

recommendations.title: Mercenary for Justice
recommendations.overview: Mercenary John Seeger is one of the best in the business. John and his crew battle some soldiers on Galmoral Island in Southern Africa as they're trying to rescue the French Ambassador -- there's a coup going on. Some of John's soldiers unload their

recommendations.title: The Bad Seed
recommendations.overview: A widower suspects that his seemingly perfect adolescent daughter is a heartless killer.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Ice Sharks
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Adventure, Action, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: A new breed of aggressive, ravenous sharks cracks the frozen ocean floor of an Arctic research station, devouring all who fall through. As the station sinks into frigid waters, those alive must fashion makeshift weapons or suffer the same fate.

recommendations.title: Fear Below
recommendations.overview: A rag-tag team of divers attempting to salvage a sunken car from a river are thwarted by a highly aggressive bull shark.

recommendations.title: Blade
recommendations.overview: The Daywalker known as "Blade" - a half-vampire, half-mortal man - becomes the protector of humanity against an underground army of vampires.

recommendations.title: Backcountry
recommendations.overview: A couple on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.
